summary: v8.1.0 Journal Mode Filter Bug Fix VERIFIED. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend correctly shows 0 entries in LIVE mode (no LIVE trades exist). Paper data is NOT showing in LIVE mode - bug is fixed.
critical_code_review_comments: === JOURNAL MODE FILTER BUG FIX VERIFICATION ===
VERIFIED: GET /api/journal/entries?mode=LIVE returns 0 entries (no LIVE trades in test env)
VERIFIED: GET /api/journal/entries?mode=PAPER returns 4 PAPER entries only (all have mode=PAPER)
VERIFIED: GET /api/journal/stats?mode=LIVE returns total=0
VERIFIED: GET /api/journal/stats?mode=PAPER returns correct stats (total=4, win_rate=25%)
VERIFIED: GET /api/journal/insights?mode=LIVE returns 'Need at least 2 journal entries' message
VERIFIED: GET /api/journal/insights?mode=PAPER returns AI insights with patterns
VERIFIED: POST /api/journal/review-all?mode=LIVE reviews only LIVE trades (0 reviewed)
VERIFIED: POST /api/journal/review-all?mode=PAPER reviews only PAPER trades
VERIFIED: GET /api/trades/history?mode=LIVE returns 0 trades
VERIFIED: GET /api/trades/history?mode=PAPER returns 4 PAPER trades only
=== FRONTEND MODE PROPAGATION ===
VERIFIED: TradeJournal component shows '0 reviews' in LIVE mode (correct - no LIVE trades)
VERIFIED: TradeAnalytics component shows 'No trades yet' in LIVE mode (correct - no LIVE trades)
VERIFIED: Paper data is NOT showing in LIVE mode - BUG IS FIXED
=== EXISTING FEATURES STILL WORKING ===
VERIFIED: GET /api/health returns version=8.1.0 with 13 routes
VERIFIED: GET /api/telegram/status returns configured=true
VERIFIED: GET /api/exit-advisor/status shows running=true
VERIFIED: GET /api/ai-guards/status returns 8 guards
VERIFIED: System Health tab shows ALL SYSTEMS GO with v8.1.0
context_for_next_testing_agent: v8.1.0 Journal Mode Filter Bug Fix VERIFIED. The bug where Paper Trading data was showing in LIVE mode is now fixed. All journal, stats, insights, review-all, and trade analytics endpoints correctly filter by mode. Test data: 4 PAPER journal entries exist, 0 LIVE entries. Current trading mode is LIVE.

bug_fix_verification.bug_description: AI Journal was showing Paper Trading data in LIVE mode
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Frontend didn't pass mode param to API calls, and backend stats/insights/review-all didn't filter by mode
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Frontend TradeJournal and TradeAnalytics now accept tradingMode prop and pass mode= param to all API calls. Backend journal.js stats, insights, review-all now filter entries by mode.
